hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.exs?$'; then old=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.old_string // ""'); new=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.new_string // ""'); old_n=$(echo "$old" | grep -cE '^[[:space:]]*defp? ' 2>/dev/null || true); new_n=$(echo "$new" | grep -cE '^[[:space:]]*defp? ' 2>/dev/null || true); if [ "$new_n" -gt "$old_n" ]; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"FUNCTION OWNERSHIP CHECK: You are adding a new function to an Elixir module. Before writing: (1) Re-read this module @moduledoc — what is its stated responsibility? (2) Does this function fit that responsibility? (3) If not, stop and add it to the correct module instead."}}'; fi; fi
